name: Your Heart
short_description: Puzzle game with a little story. The rules are simple! Clear the stage by absorbing the three colored orbs into the pedestals of each color. Gradually, various gimmicks are added, and the difficulty increases. By the way... who are you, and why are you solving these puzzles?
detailed_description:
Puzzle game with a little story. The rules are simple! Clear the stage by absorbing the three colored orbs into the pedestals of each color. Gradually, various gimmicks are added, and the difficulty increases.

By the way... who are you, and why are you solving these puzzles?

Play with a mouse or gamepad. Gamepads only support XInput.
You can change the language, resolution (1920*1080 or 1280*720), and gamepad cursor speed from the "Settings" in the game.
Languages ​​available are Japanese, English, Chinese (Simplified) (Traditional), Spanish, French, German, Hindi, Korean, and Russian.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Hindi
